mechanism: miR156 cleaves SPL3 mRNA at a site in the 3 prime UTR; translational repression also contributes

mechanism: miR156 targets SPL9 mRNA for cleavage and translational repression; high miR156 in juvenile phase keeps SPL9 levels low

mechanism: miR156 targets SPL10 mRNA for cleavage and translational repression

mechanism: miR156 targets SPL13 mRNA for cleavage and translational repression

mechanism: miR156 targets SPL15 mRNA for cleavage and translational repression

mechanism: SPL9 directly binds to the promoter of MIR172B approximately 1.2 kb upstream of the transcriptional start site and activates its transcription

mechanism: SPL10 activates MIR172B transcription directly, acting redundantly with SPL9

mechanism: SPL15 directly binds to and activates MIR172A, MIR172B, MIR172C, and MIR172D promoters
evidence_sentence: SPL15 activates MIR172A, MIR172B, MIR172C, MIR172D by transcriptional direct binding

mechanism: miR172 downregulates AP2 by translational repression (predominantly) rather than RNA cleavage

mechanism: miR172 downregulates TOE1 by translational repression; overexpression of miR172 suppresses TOE1 overexpression phenotype

mechanism: miR172 downregulates TOE2 by post-transcriptional repression

mechanism: miR172 targets SMZ (SCHLAFMUTZE) mRNA for degradation; SMZ is a potent repressor of flowering via FT repression

mechanism: miR172 targets SNZ (SCHNARCHZAPFEN) mRNA for degradation; SNZ is an AP2-like floral repressor

mechanism: AP2 represses FT transcription; miR172 promotes flowering by relieving AP2 repression of FT

mechanism: TOE2 represses FT transcription as part of the AP2-like floral repressor family

mechanism: SMZ directly binds to the FT locus chromatin and represses its transcription; SMZ binds 434 targets by ChIP-chip

mechanism: SPL3 directly binds promoter-proximal candidate SPL binding sites of FUL and activates its transcription

mechanism: SPL3 directly binds multiple regions of the AP1 promoter and activates its transcription

mechanism: SPL9 directly binds to the first intron of SOC1 containing GTAC box motifs and activates its transcription independently of FT/FD

mechanism: SPL9 activates FUL transcription; FUL transcripts reduced approximately 50% in spl2/9/11/13/15 quintuple mutant

mechanism: SPL9 activates AP1 transcription; AP1 levels reduced approximately 50% in spl2/9/11/13/15 quintuple mutant
evidence_sentence: AP1 transcripts reduced approximately 50% in spl2/9/11/13/15 mutant vs Col

mechanism: SPL15 directly binds to and activates FUL transcription

mechanism: FUL directly binds to regulatory regions of AP2 and represses its transcription

mechanism: Sucrose (and its hydrolytic hexose products glucose/fructose) represses MIR156A and MIR156C gene transcription, reducing mature miR156 levels to promote juvenile-to-adult transition

mechanism: FLC directly represses SOC1 (a flowering pathway integrator) by binding to its promoter

mechanism: FLC targets SPL15 and SPL3 promoters, repressing their transcription

mechanism: FLC directly binds and represses SPL15 transcription
evidence_sentence: FLC targets two SPL genes, SPL15 and SPL3

mechanism: SPL9 promotes floral transition and shoot maturation; higher SPL9 activity leads to earlier flowering and shorter inflorescence stems. spl9 spl15 double mutant showed significantly reduced inflorescence height (6.9 cm vs 12.1 cm in wild-type) demonstrating SPL9 shortens plant height via earlier reproductive transition

mechanism: High miR156 keeps SPL levels low, extending the juvenile phase, delaying flowering, and allowing the plant to grow taller before reproductive transition; 35S::MIR156A plants flower 7.6 days later with more rosette leaves in LD, producing taller inflorescences

mechanism: LDL1 (LSD1-LIKE1) is an H3K4 demethylase that represses FLC expression redundantly with FLD; ldl1 mutants flower later than wild-type

mechanism: GA 20-oxidase 3, one of five GA20ox genes in Arabidopsis

mechanism: PIF7 is a master regulator of thermomorphogenesis in shade promoting elongation

mechanism: Red light converts phyB to active Pfr form; far-red converts back to inactive Pr

mechanism: Blue light activates cryptochrome CRY1

mechanism: PIF4 binds the TAA1 promoter to activate auxin biosynthesis
evidence_sentence: PIF4 and PIF5 directly bind to the promoters of auxin biosynthetic genes YUC8, TAA1, and CYP79B2

mechanism: PIF4 directly activates IAA19 expression to promote elongation

mechanism: PIF4 activates GA20ox1 transcription to raise GA levels in shade and high temperature

mechanism: ARF6 activates auxin-responsive elongation genes in hypocotyl and stem

mechanism: ARF7 activates auxin-responsive elongation genes

mechanism: ARF8 promotes elongation downstream of auxin

mechanism: Auxin promotes GA biosynthesis by inducing GA20ox1/3ox expression

mechanism: DET2 is a steroid 5-alpha-reductase catalyzing a key step of BR biosynthesis; det2 mutants are extreme dwarfs

mechanism: DWF4 (CYP90B1) C-22 hydroxylase catalyzes the rate-limiting step in BR biosynthesis

mechanism: CPD (CYP90A1) catalyzes C-3 oxidation step of BR biosynthesis; cpd mutants are dwarfs
evidence_sentence: The key steps in BR synthesis are 5-alpha-reduction, C-22 hydroxylation, C-3 oxidation, and C6-oxidation catalyzed by DET2, DWF4, CPD, and cytochrome P450 CYP85A

mechanism: CYP85A1 (BR6ox1) catalyzes C6-oxidation converting castasterone to brassinolide
